\tzpentry{ID4483}{Dipole Chemical Potential Definition}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4483 introduces Dipole Chemical Potential Definition as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \mathscr{D}_{\text{dipole}}^{\otimes}\!\left[\vec{\mu}_1 \oplus \vec{\mu}_2\right] := \begin{cases} \mathrm{Hom}_{\infty}\!\left(\vec{\mu}_1, -\vec{\mu}_2\right), & \text{if } \vec{\mu}_1 \cdot \vec{\mu}_2 < 0, \\[0.4em] \mathrm{Cone}\!\left(\vec{\mu}_1 \xrightarrow{\ \phi\ } \vec{\mu}_2\right), & \text{if } \exists\,\phi \in \mathrm{Aut}(\mathbf{SO}(3)). \end{cases} \end{equation}
